textAr: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسَـٰنِ حِينٌ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًٔا مَّذْكُورًا
textEn: Has there [not] come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned?

textAr: إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ سَمِيعًۢا بَصِيرًا
textEn: Indeed, We created man from a sperm-drop mixture that We may try him; and We made him hearing and seeing.

textAr: إِنَّا هَدَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
textEn: Indeed, We guided him to the way, be he grateful or be he ungrateful.

textAr: إِنَّآ أَعْتَدْنَا لِلْكَـٰفِرِينَ سَلَـٰسِلَا۟ وَأَغْلَـٰلًا وَسَعِيرًا
textEn: Indeed, We have prepared for the disbelievers chains and shackles and a blaze.

textAr: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
textEn: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of Kāfūr,

textAr: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
textEn: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allāh will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].

textAr: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسْتَطِيرًا
textEn: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread.

textAr: وَيُطْعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسْكِينًا وَيَتِيمًا وَأَسِيرًا
textEn: And they give food in spite of love for it to the needy, the orphan, and the captive,

textAr: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
textEn: [Saying], "We feed you only for the face [i.e., approval] of Allāh. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.

textAr: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا
textEn: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful."

textAr: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمْ نَضْرَةً وَسُرُورًا
textEn: So Allāh will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness

textAr: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ جَنَّةً وَحَرِيرًا
textEn: And will reward them for what they patiently endured [with] a garden [in Paradise] and silk [garments].

textAr: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ ۖ لَا يَرَوْنَ فِيهَا شَمْسًا وَلَا زَمْهَرِيرًا
textEn: [They will be] reclining therein on adorned couches. They will not see therein any [burning] sun or [freezing] cold.

textAr: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلَـٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًا
textEn: And near above them are its shades, and its [fruit] to be picked will be lowered in compliance.

textAr: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٍ مِّن فِضَّةٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا۠
textEn: And there will be circulated among them vessels of silver and cups having been [created] clear [as glass],

textAr: قَوَارِيرَا۟ مِن فِضَّةٍ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقْدِيرًا
textEn: Clear glasses [made] from silver of which they have determined the measure.

textAr: وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
textEn: And they will be given to drink a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of ginger

textAr: عَيْنًا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلْسَبِيلًا
textEn: [From] a fountain within it [i.e., Paradise] named Salsabeel.

textAr: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا
textEn: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.

textAr: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًا وَمُلْكًا كَبِيرًا
textEn: And when you look there [in Paradise], you will see pleasure and great dominion.

textAr: عَـٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ ۖ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
textEn: Upon them [i.e., the inhabitants] will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.

textAr: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَآءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا
textEn: [And it will be said], "Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated."

textAr: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَنزِيلًا
textEn: Indeed, it is We who have sent down to you, [O Muḥammad], the Qur’ān progressively.

textAr: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ ءَاثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًا
textEn: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever].

textAr: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا
textEn: And mention the name of your Lord [in prayer] morning and evening

textAr: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَٱسْجُدْ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحْهُ لَيْلًا طَوِيلًا
textEn: And during the night prostrate to Him and exalt [i.e., praise] Him a long [part of the] night.

textAr: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمْ يَوْمًا ثَقِيلًا
textEn: Indeed, these [disbelievers] love the immediate and leave behind them a grave Day.

textAr: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنَـٰهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَآ أَسْرَهُمْ ۖ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَآ أَمْثَـٰلَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا
textEn: We have created them and strengthened their forms, and when We will, We can change their likenesses with [complete] alteration.

textAr: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
textEn: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way.

textAr: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
textEn: And you do not will except that Allāh wills. Indeed, Allāh is ever Knowing and Wise.

textAr: يُدْخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِى رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ وَٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًۢا
textEn: He admits whom He wills into His mercy; but the wrongdoers - He has prepared for them a painful punishment.
